ddls:
CREATE TABLE "chemical_substances" (
  "substance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chemical substance */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the chemical substance */,
  "ec_list_no" TEXT /* European Community (EC) registration number */,
  "cas_no" TEXT /* Chemical Abstracts Service (CAS) number */,
  "classification" TEXT /* Hazard classification of the substance */,
  "source" INTEGER /* ID of the source of the hazard classification */,
  "details_link" TEXT /* Link to view additional details */,
  "molecular_formula" TEXT /* Molecular formula of the chemical substance */,
  "molecular_weight" REAL /* Molecular weight of the chemical substance */,
  "physical_state" TEXT /* Physical state of the chemical substance (e.g., solid, liquid, gas) */,
  "boiling_point" REAL /* Boiling point of the substance */,
  "melting_point" REAL /* Melting point of the substance */,
  "storage_conditions" TEXT /* Recommended storage conditions */,
  "cas_date" TEXT /* Date the CAS number was assigned */,
  "ec_date" TEXT /* Date the EC number was assigned */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update to the substance record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("substance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chemical_substances_source FOREIGN KEY ("source") REFERENCES sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hazard_classifications" (
  "classification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hazard classification */,
  "classification_name" TEXT /* Name of the hazard classification */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the hazard classification */,
  "severity_level" INTEGER /* Severity level of the hazard (e.g., 1, 2, 3, 4) */,
  "precautionary_statements" TEXT /* Precautionary statements related to the hazard classification */,
  "pictogram" TEXT /* Pictogram associated with the hazard classification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("classification_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "substance_classifications" (
  "substance_classification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each substance-classification relationship */,
  "substance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chemical substance */,
  "classification_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hazard classification */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the classification became effective */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Date when the classification expires or is reviewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("substance_classification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_substance_classifications_substance_id FOREIGN KEY ("substance_id") REFERENCES chemical_substances ("substance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_substance_classifications_classification_id FOREIGN KEY ("classification_id") REFERENCES hazard_classifications ("classification_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source (e.g., Notified C&L) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the source */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the source */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update to the source record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "substance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chemical substance the document belongs to */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of the document (e.g., SDS, Compliance) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the document in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "document_version" INTEGER /* Version number of the document */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the document */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date and time of the last modification to the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_uploaded_by FOREIGN KEY ("uploaded_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_substance_id FOREIGN KEY ("substance_id") REFERENCES chemical_substances ("substance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., chemist, safety officer, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "substance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chemical substance being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the substance */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the substance was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the substance */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_substance_id FOREIGN KEY ("substance_id") REFERENCES chemical_substances ("substance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "substance_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "substance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chemical substance */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Changes made in this version */,
  "version_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the version change */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the changes */,
  "review_status" TEXT /* Review status (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_substance_versions_substance_id FOREIGN KEY ("substance_id") REFERENCES chemical_substances ("substance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_substance_versions_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "substance_versions_classifications" (
  "version_classification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version-classification relationship */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the substance version */,
  "classification_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hazard classification */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the classification became effective in this version */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Date when the classification expires or is reviewed in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_classification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_substance_versions_classifications_classification_id FOREIGN KEY ("classification_id") REFERENCES hazard_classifications ("classification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_substance_versions_classifications_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES substance_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "substance_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "substance_id_1" INTEGER /* ID of the first chemical substance */,
  "substance_id_2" INTEGER /* ID of the second chemical substance */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of the interaction (e.g., reaction, compatibility) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the interaction */,
  "interaction_severity" INTEGER /* Severity level of the interaction */,
  "recommended_actions" TEXT /* Recommended actions to avoid or manage the interaction */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update to the interaction record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_substance_interactions_substance_id_2 FOREIGN KEY ("substance_id_2") REFERENCES chemical_substances ("substance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_substance_interactions_substance_id_1 FOREIGN KEY ("substance_id_1") REFERENCES chemical_substances ("substance_id")
)
